expectations.evidence: Line 48: 'ART: Continue current regimen — TDF/3TC/DTG (tenofovir 300 mg / lamivudine 300 mg / dolutegravir 50 mg) daily. No change indicated; viral load is suppressed (<50 copies/mL). Reinforce adherence counseling.'
Line 59: 'Viral load monitoring: Schedule next viral load at 34-36 weeks to guide delivery planning.'

expectations.text: Infant prophylaxis or PMTCT planning mentioned
expectations.evidence: Lines 52-56: PMTCT Plan section includes 'Continue ART throughout pregnancy, delivery, and postpartum (lifelong, Option B+)', 'Plan for infant ARV prophylaxis at birth per national PMTCT guidelines', 'Plan infant HIV testing per national protocol (typically PCR at 6 weeks of age)', and safe infant feeding counseling.
Line 16: 'Anemia status: Mild anemia — Hb 10.8 g/dL (range 10.0-10.9 g/dL)'

expectations.text: Standard iron/folate supplementation recommended alongside ART
expectations.evidence: Lines 36-37: 'Iron: 120 mg elemental iron daily (therapeutic dose)' and 'Folic acid: 400 mcg (0.4 mg) daily'. These are recommended alongside ongoing ART (line 48).
